and TAs Your biographic data All information we list by default is available publicly from the internet through other means. In particular, pictures are from the faculty roster pages on the EECS websites. Correcting information Since there is a larg

ites. Correcting information Since there is a large amount of data involved, sometimes there are human or automation errors. For any kind of comment or request, email coursesurveys@hkn.EECS . add/change/remove personal information: spelling/capitali

, or with different spelling link to a URL that comments on your ratings Opt-in/Opt-out If you are a GSI that has been evaluated and would like to hide or unhide your ratings, email coursesurveys@hkn.EECS . Source data and Written comments The EECS d

EECS . Source data and Written comments The EECS department handles the Scantron input. To see the raw data, including written comments, visit the department CS office ( Soda 381 ) for CS classes, or the EE office ( Cory 231 ) for EE classes (not th

the EE office ( Cory 231 ) for EE classes (not the HKN offices!). Email addresses Rest assured that spammers are not getting your email address through HKN Course Surveys. Though your email address looks normal and clickable when rendered by a mode
looks normal and clickable when rendered by a modern Javascript-enabled browser, it is obfuscated in the HTML source such that web spiders cannot get it. Eta Kappa Nu, Mu Chapter HOME | CONTACT
